reason: Replace duplicated locale formulas and arbitrary VAT-withholding percentages with one reviewed Cameroon VAT engine and explicit evidence boundaries.

formula.standard: 17.5% base VAT + CAC equal to 10% of base VAT = 19.25% effective
formula.turnoverBoundary: XAF 50,000,000 is included in the real-regime review path; below it is the IGS review path
formula.withholding: full VAT withholding is shown only after explicit confirmation that the buyer is currently DGI-authorized

failClosedBoundaries: Unknown reduced rates are rejected by the engine
Zero-rate and exemption classifications require external statutory evidence
